ddls:
CREATE TABLE "character_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the character class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character requirement */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the requirement (e.g., Strength, Dexterity) */,
  "parameter_bonus" TEXT /* Bonus parameter associated with the requirement */,
  "attack_values" TEXT /* Type of attack value related to the requirement */,
  "damage_reduction" TEXT /* Percentage of damage reduction provided by the requirement */,
  "auxiliary_effects" TEXT /* Auxiliary effects granted by the requirement */,
  "others" TEXT /* Additional notes or effects related to the requirement */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character class it belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_requirements_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES character_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character stat */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character class it belongs to */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character requirement it belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the character stat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_stats_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES character_requirements ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_stats_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES character_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attack_values" (
  "attack_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attack value */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the requirement it relates to */,
  "attack_type" TEXT /* Type of attack (e.g., Physical, Magic) */,
  "attack_power" REAL /* Power level of the attack */,
  "scale_factor" REAL /* Scaling factor for the attack value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attack_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attack_values_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES character_requirements ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "damage_reductions" (
  "reduction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each damage reduction entry */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the requirement it relates to */,
  "damage_type" TEXT /* Type of damage that the reduction applies to */,
  "reduction_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of damage reduction */,
  "cap" REAL /* Cap on damage reduction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reduction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_damage_reductions_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES character_requirements ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auxiliary_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auxiliary effect */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the requirement it relates to */,
  "effect_name" TEXT /* Name of the effect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the effect */,
  "chance_to_trigger" REAL /* Chance to trigger the effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auxiliary_effects_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES character_requirements ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "others" (
  "other_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each additional note */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the requirement it relates to */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., Durability, Weight) */,
  "note_description" TEXT /* Description of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("other_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_others_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES character_requirements ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, developer, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation configuration */,
  "character_class" TEXT /* Character class used in the simulation */,
  "stats" TEXT /* Stats used in the simulation */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)
